CreateProbe.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateProbe.name: Network probe name, up to 65 characters, consisting of digits, letters, and underscores.
CreateProbe.description: Network probe description, up to 200 characters.
CreateProbe.vpcId: ID of the VPC to which the network probe belongs.
CreateProbe.subnetId: ID of the subnet to which the network probe belongs.
CreateProbe.protocol: Probe type. Currently supports ICMP, TCP, UDP, and DNS.
CreateProbe.sourceIps: List of probe source IPs. Can be empty; if so, sourceIpNum must be specified.
CreateProbe.sourceIpNum: Number of probe source IPs to be automatically assigned.
CreateProbe.destPort: Probe destination port. Required for TCP, UDP, and DNS probe types.
CreateProbe.payload: Probe string for UDP type or probe domain name for DNS type.
